summary: Tested new simplified driver interface for 'طلباتي' (My Orders) in Trend Syria delivery app. The MyOrdersList component with expandable cards, step-by-step actions, and code modals is working correctly. All key features tested successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: MyOrdersList.js - Well-structured component with expandable cards using AnimatePresence for smooth animations
Pickup/Delivery code modals properly prevent body scroll when open (usePreventBodyScroll hook)
Order status logic correctly determines 'to_store' vs 'to_customer' based on delivery_status
Google Maps integration opens external link with waypoints for all orders
AvailableOrdersList.js - Clean card design with distance calculation and earnings display
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test data (3 driver orders, 4 available orders)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver interface simplified successfully. Key flows: Login -> Dismiss push notification prompt -> Make driver available (click 'مغلق' to toggle to 'متاح') -> Navigate to 'طلباتي' tab -> Click order card to expand -> Use action buttons. localStorage key 'push_prompt_shown_delivery=true' prevents notification prompt.

features: Google Maps navigation button (ابدأ التوصيل في Google Maps)
Expandable order cards with ChevronDown/Up icons

expanded_content: Primary action button (وصلت للمتجر or وصلت للعميل)

notes: usePreventBodyScroll hook properly handles modal scroll prevention
Order status logic at lines 94-100 correctly determines to_store vs to_customer
Google Maps URL construction at lines 209-249 handles multiple orders
Expandable cards use AnimatePresence for smooth animations
Code modals have proper input validation (4+ digits required)
SimpleOrderCard component is clean and reusable
Distance calculation integrates with driver location
Batch order support with special styling
